name: Lockheed Martin Corporation
content: Lockheed Martin Corporation is a global security and aerospace company that is principally engaged in the research, design, development, manufacture, integration, and sustainment of advanced technology systems, products, and services. As a leading defense contractor, the company operates through four primary business segments: Aeronautics, Missiles and Fire Control, Rotary and Mission Systems, and Space. Lockheed Martin is renowned for producing iconic platforms such as the F-35 Lightning II, C-130 Hercules, and various missile defense systems, serving both domestic and international military and government customers.
